---

## Project Context

This is a TypeScript microservice built with hexagonal architecture and DDD.
The domain layer must remain free of framework dependencies.
All external dependencies (HTTP, database, messaging) are adapters behind ports.

## Commands

- **Build**: `pnpm build`
- **Test**: `pnpm test --run`
- **Lint**: `pnpm lint`

## Project-Level Policy Overrides

The following decisions explicitly override the default guidance in the fragments above.
ADRs are the source of truth for this project; fragments are defaults.

| Fragment default | Project override | ADR |
|---|---|---|
| `api-design.md`: "Version in the URL path, not headers" | This project uses `X-API-Version` request header versioning. Default is `v1` when header is absent. | [ADR-0004](docs/adr/0004-api-versioning-via-header.md) |

When a conflict exists between a fragment and an ADR, **the ADR takes precedence**.
